ogTitle: Lake Darlot vs Lake Deborah: Climate Safety

heading: Lake Darlot vs Lake Deborah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lake Darlot, Western Australia and Lake Deborah, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lake Darlot has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Lake Deborah (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lake Darlot or Lake Deborah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lake Darlot has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Lake Deborah scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lake Darlot scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Lake Deborah scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lake Darlot or Lake Deborah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lake Darlot has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
